series_metadata.series_description: These computer generated ledgers show daily vehicle registration sales and are used to reconcile with daily sales collected from data terminals.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report released, then destroy 5 years thereafter. These records are no longer created as of November 2005. ; Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report released, then destroy 5 years thereafter. These records are no longer created as of November 2005. ; Microform: The microfiche is generated from the State of Ohio Computer Center. It is duplicated and verified - the original is transferred to the ODPS Record Center for off-site storage, and a copy retained in the section. Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report released, then destroy 5 years thereafter. These records are no longer created as of November 2005., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete ; Microform: Shred
